title: Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Field Assistant, Junior Research Fellow Posts
short_info: Tezpur University has published the Project Staff Notification 2026 on the official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Project Staff positions. Candidates within the age limit up to 28 years and holding qualifications such as M.Sc. with NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE for JRF or B.Sc./Diploma for Field Assistant are eligible to apply through email mode. The application process will remain active up to 05 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years (Relaxable as per Govt. of India rules)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. with NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE for JRF, B.Sc./Diploma for Field Assistant.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.Sc. with minimum 55% marks or equivalent CGPA in Environmental Science/Anthropology/Forestry/other relevant Biological Sciences/ Applied Sciences with NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE. Desirable: Experience in survey techniques and data collection on bioresources utilization in traditional crafts of indigenous communities, and willing to undertake extensive fieldwork in different ethnic forest villages of Manipur. Experience of handling in remote sensing & GIS software, data analysis and interpretation. Field Assistant: Minimum qualification of B.Sc./Diplomas in relevant discipline of Biological Sciences/ Applied Sciences. Desirable: Experience in community-based fieldwork; knowledge of local languages and cultures; congenial in extensive field survey, working experience in different ethnic forest villages of Manipur, crafts specimen collection, storing, processing and preservation of specimens. Basic computation skill like, MS office, data compilation, file handling and office management.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs. 37,000/- per month, Field Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tezpur University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
